package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "testing"
)

// Positive scenario for sql_query_text_asserted_in_handler_tests: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: SQL-shape assertions written at handler level instead of repository tests.
type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsModel
}

type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsService struct {
    repo *CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTests(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsDTO) error {
    focus := "sql_query_text_asserted_in"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    var request CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&request)
    request.TenantID = c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID")
    c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": input, "tenant": request.TenantID})
    repo := &CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    repo.db = repo.db.Session(&gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true})
    repo.db.Where("tenant_id = ?", c.Query("tenant")).Find(&[]CaseSqlQueryTextAssertedInHandlerTestsModel{})
    repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = " + input)
    testCase := struct { name string; raw string }{"full stack", input}
    _ = (*testing.T)(nil)
    _ = testCase
    sql_query_text_asserted_handler_positive := map[string]int{"sql": 1, "query": 2, "text": 3, "asserted": 4, "handler": 5, "tests": 6}
    sql_query_text_asserted_handler_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sql_positive_0 := db.Where("sql_id = ?", input)
    _ = sql_positive_0
    query_positive_1 := db.Where("query_id = ?", input)
    _ = query_positive_1
    text_positive_2 := sql_query_text_asserted_handler_positive["text"] + len(input)
    _ = text_positive_2
    asserted_positive_3 := sql_query_text_asserted_handler_positive["asserted"] + len(input)
    _ = asserted_positive_3
    handler_positive_4 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_positive_4
    tests_positive_5 := sql_query_text_asserted_handler_positive["tests"] + len(input)
    _ = tests_positive_5
    return nil
}
